overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a rain-soaked, neon-lit downtown district. The player character moves from a commercial street past the 'Masala Studios' building, through a covered protest area with burning barrels, and back to the main street with police presence.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial boulevard with entertainment studios

agents.ego_description: walking along the wet pavement past the brightly lit Masala Studios building, observing the neon reflections on the ground

notable_agents.action: person in light-colored jacket walking ahead on the right side

entered.detail: large commercial building with prominent yellow 'MASALA STUDIOS' neon signage
tall vertical digital billboard displaying colorful advertisements
tall street lamps illuminating the foggy atmosphere

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rain-soaked cyberpunk street at night, dominated by the bright yellow neon signage of Masala Studios. The camera moves forward along the wet pavement, reflecting the colorful neon lights, while pedestrians walk ahead in the same direction through the hazy, foggy atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk with building facade and palm trees

events.description: turns left onto sidewalk alongside tall concrete building wall
approaching intersection with crosswalk leading to covered area ahead

agents.ego_description: proceeding along the sidewalk next to a massive concrete building, passing pedestrians moving in both directions

notable_agents.action: person in dark clothing walking toward camera on the left

entered.detail: tall smooth concrete facade of adjacent building with minimal windows
tall palm trees lining the sidewalk edge
metal crowd control railing along the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: The camera turns left onto a narrower sidewalk bordered by a massive concrete building wall on the left and the street on the right. Palm trees line the path as the character walks past oncoming pedestrians, approaching an intersection that leads into a covered, industrial-looking area ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered urban passage with protest gathering and burning barrels

events.description: enters covered industrial area with dense crowd of protesters
crowd density increases significantly with people holding protest signs and gathering around burning barrels

agents.ego_description: navigating through a dense crowd of protesters holding signs, moving carefully between groups gathered around burning barrels

notable_agents.action: protester holding up a cardboard sign above their head
person in white outfit standing near a burning barrel

entered.detail: bright linear fluorescent lights mounted on the ceiling of the covered passage
metal barrel with open fire burning inside, providing warmth and light
cardboard signs held by protesters, some with visible text
large vertical concrete pillars supporting the overhead structure
scattered cardboard, bags, and litter on the ground

segments.scene_description: The scene shifts dramatically as the camera enters a covered, industrial passage filled with a dense crowd of protesters. People stand holding signs while fires burn in metal barrels, casting flickering light on the concrete walls. The atmosphere is tense and crowded, with trash scattered across the asphalt ground under harsh overhead lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: downtown intersection with police presence and neon signage

events.description: exits covered protest area back into open neon-lit street with police vehicles
passing parked police car on the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: crossing the street and continuing along the sidewalk, passing police vehicles and pedestrians

notable_agents.action: black police car parked on the sidewalk with emergency lights

entered.detail: black police vehicle with 'POLICE' marking parked on the sidewalk
large vertical digital billboard displaying green neon graphics
white striped pedestrian crossing markings on the asphalt

segments.scene_description: The camera exits the covered protest area back into the open street, crossing a marked crosswalk. A police car is parked prominently on the left sidewalk, while neon billboards illuminate the right side of the street. The crowd thins out as the character continues walking along the wet pavement past the police presence.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a rain-soaked cyberpunk district, moving from a bright commercial street into a tense protest zone before returning to the open city. It begins on a wet pavement dominated by the yellow neon glow of Masala Studios, gliding through a hazy atmosphere alongside other pedestrians. As the camera turns left, the scene narrows into a sidewalk lined with palm trees and concrete walls, leading toward a dark, industrial intersection. The environment then shifts dramatically as the camera enters a covered passage filled with a dense crowd of protesters and flickering fires in metal barrels that cast harsh light across the trash-strewn asphalt. Finally, the camera exits the crowded enclosure and crosses a marked crosswalk, returning to the open street where neon billboards illuminate the rain and a police car stands parked on the sidewalk.
